description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, industrial design with a metallic body and glowing blue accents running along its length. The main housing is robust and angular, with a cylindrical core visible through transparent or open slats, suggesting an energy or plasma-based mechanism. At the front, pronged metallic extensions surround the muzzle, possibly for stabilization or as part of a unique firing system. The rear section is compact and reinforced, with side-mounted cylindrical components that may serve as power cells or cooling units. The grip and trigger area are integrated into the main body, with a protruding handle for user operation. The overall appearance is high-tech, with a blend of steel, glass, and illuminated elements, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A futuristic rifle with a metallic body, glowing blue accents, and pronged front extensions, featuring a robust, high-tech design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pronged muzzle extensions and the central glowing blue core, with the main barrel and side components visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated body, transparent slats revealing the blue core, and the cylindrical side component near the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the circular, illuminated end of the core and the symmetrical arrangement of the pronged extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the side-mounted cylinder and the full length of the glowing core.
